tools.name: lol_search_champion_meta
tools.description: RAG search for LoL champion knowledge: skill stats/ratios, recommended builds/runes, counters, tier/winrate. Use keyword-style queries, not questions.

query.description: Keyword-style search query for RAG retrieval. Use concise keywords, NOT questions. Good: "Ahri Q damage ratio". Bad: "What is Ahri Q damage?"

tools.name: lol_get_champion_analysis
tools.description: Returns detailed champion stats (win/pick/ban rates), optimal builds (items, runes, skills, spells), counter matchups, and team synergies for a specific champion and position. MUST call when user mentions any champion, asks for item/skill recommendations, gameplay tips, or matchup strategies. Counter picks available in weak_counters field. Infer position from context if not specified.

game_mode.description: Game mode (RANKED, FLEX, URF, ARAM, NEXUS_BLITZ)

champion.description: Champion name in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (e.g., AHRI, LEE_SIN)

position.description: Lane position (top, mid, jungle, adc, support)

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract

tools.name: lol_get_champion_synergies
tools.description: Returns synergy recommendations (win rate + role fit) for your champion and the ally lane you specify.

champion.description: Champion name in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (e.g., AHRI, LEE_SIN)

my_position.description: Lane position (top, mid, jungle, adc, support)

synergy_position.description: Lane position (top, mid, jungle, adc, support)

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract
desired_output_fields.description:
Select ONLY from fields below. This is a CLOSED SET. Do NOT invent new field names.

Available fields:
- champion
- data.synergies[].synergy_tier_data.{rank,rank_prev,rank_prev_patch,tier}
- data.synergies[].{champion_id,champion_name,play,position,score,score_rank,synergy_champion_id,synergy_champion_name,synergy_position,win,win_rate}
- lang
- my_position
- synergy_position

Field descriptions:
- synergies.*.synergy_tier_data.tier: Synergy tier (0=OP, 1=S, 2=A, 3=B, 4=C)

tools.name: lol_get_lane_matchup_guide
tools.description: Provides lane matchup guidance for your champion versus a named opponent, including position-specific tips, runes, and item timings.

position.description: Lane position (top, mid, jungle, adc, support)

my_champion.description: Champion name in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (e.g., AHRI, LEE_SIN)

opponent_champion.description: Champion name in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (e.g., AHRI, LEE_SIN)

tools.name: lol_get_pro_player_riot_id
tools.description: Looks up a pro player alias and returns their Riot ID plus team/region metadata so you can link their OP.GG profile.

player_name.description: Nickname, alias, or real name fragment of the pro player (e.g., Faker, Ruler, Deft).

region.description: League region to constrain the lookup (KR, NA, EUW, etc.).

return_suggestions.description: Set true to include close matches when the exact alias is not found.

tools.name: lol_get_summoner_game_detail
tools.description: Returns full match detail (teams, participants, builds, bans) for a specific game id whenever the user drills into a single match.

region.description: Server region code (e.g., KR, NA, EUW)

game_id.description: Unique identifier for the target match.

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract

tools.name: lol_get_summoner_profile
tools.description: Returns summoner profile with rank, tier, LP, win rate, and champion pool. MUST call for identity/profile/rank queries. DO NOT call for match history. Ask for region if not found.

game_name.description: Riot ID game name before the "#" (e.g., "Faker" from "Faker#KR1")

tag_line.description: Riot ID tag line following the "#" (e.g., "KR1" from "Faker#KR1")

region.description: Server region code (e.g., KR, NA, EUW)

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract

tools.name: lol_list_champion_details
tools.description: Returns ability, tip, lore, and stat metadata for up to 10 champions (skins/media trimmed for smaller payloads).

champions.description: Array of champion names in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract
desired_output_fields.description:
Select ONLY from fields below. This is a CLOSED SET. Do NOT invent new field names.

Available fields:
- data.champions[].info.{attack,defense,difficulty,magic}
- data.champions[].passive.{description,name}
- data.champions[].spells[].{cooldown_burn[],cooldown_burn_float[],cost_burn[],description,key,max_rank,name,range_burn[],tooltip}
- data.champions[].stats.{armor,armorperlevel,attackdamage,attackdamageperlevel,attackrange,attackspeed,attackspeedperlevel,crit,critperlevel,hp,hpperlevel,hpregen,hpregenperlevel,movespeed,mp,mpperlevel,mpregen,mpregenperlevel,spellblock,spellblockperlevel}
- data.champions[].{ally_tips[],blurb,enemy_tips[],id,key,lore,name,partype,release_date,tags[],title}
- lang
- requested_champions[]

Field descriptions:
- partype: Resource type (mana, energy, rage, etc.)
- evolve: Champion evolution information (true if champion can evolve abilities)
- info.attack: Attack power rating (0-10 scale)
- info.defense: Defensive capability rating (0-10 scale)
- info.magic: Magic power rating (0-10 scale)
- info.difficulty: Gameplay difficulty rating (0-10 scale)
- stats.mp: Base mana/resource points
- stats.spellblock: Base magic resistance
- stats.hpregen: Health regeneration per 5 seconds
- stats.mpregen: Mana regeneration per 5 seconds

tools.name: lol_list_champion_leaderboard
tools.description: Lists the top master+ players for a champion/region so you can study their builds and match stats.

region.description: Server region code (e.g., KR, NA, EUW)

champion.description: Champion name in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (e.g., AHRI, LEE_SIN)

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract

tools.name: lol_list_champions
tools.description: Returns every champion's id, key, name, and release date in the requested language.

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract
desired_output_fields.description:
Select ONLY from fields below. This is a CLOSED SET. Do NOT invent new field names.

Available fields:
- data.champions[].{champion_id,key,name,release_date}
- lang

Field descriptions:
- key: Champion key (internal code name, e.g., MonkeyKing for Wukong)

tools.name: lol_list_discounted_skins
tools.description: Retrieves information about champion skins that are currently on sale.

champion.description: Optional. Champion name in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (e.g., AHRI, LEE_SIN). If provided, only returns discounted skins for that champion.

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract
desired_output_fields.description:
Select ONLY from fields below. This is a CLOSED SET. Do NOT invent new field names.

Available fields:
- data[].{champion_id,champion_key,champion_name,cost,currency,discount_rate,ended_at,skin_id,skin_name,started_at}
- lang

Field descriptions:
- data.*.discount_rate: Discount rate (e.g., 0.5 for 50% off)

tools.name: lol_list_items
tools.description: Returns localized items (ids, names, build trees, mythic flags, gold costs) filtered by map (default Summoner's Rift).

map.description: Map identifier (SUMMONERS_RIFT, HOWLING_ABYSS, NEXUS_BLITZ, TEAMFIGHT_TACTICS, ARENA_MAP_1).

tools.name: lol_list_lane_meta_champions
tools.description: Returns lane-by-lane champion tiers with win/pick/ban rates, KDA, and tier rankings. Tier 1 champions are OP and easy to play - recommend them for strong picks. Filter by position or use "all" for every lane.

position.description: Lane position (top, mid, jungle, adc, support)

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract

tools.name: lol_list_summoner_matches
tools.description: Returns recent match history with per-game stats for the target summoner only (excludes enemy stats). MUST call for match history, performance analysis, or improvement tips. DO NOT call for profile/rank queries. Use lol_get_summoner_game_detail for full game details with all players.

game_name.description: Riot ID game name before the "#" (e.g., "Faker" from "Faker#KR1")

tag_line.description: Riot ID tag line following the "#" (e.g., "KR1" from "Faker#KR1")

region.description: Server region code (e.g., KR, NA, EUW)

limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return.

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract

tools.name: lol_list_summoner_matches_deprecated
tools.description: Deprecated structured match history tool; only run it when the user literally says "please".

game_name.description: Riot ID game name before the "#" (e.g., "Faker" from "Faker#KR1")

tag_line.description: Riot ID tag line following the "#" (e.g., "KR1" from "Faker#KR1")

region.description: Server region code (e.g., KR, NA, EUW)

limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return.

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract

tools.name: lol_calc_ability_haste_cooldown
tools.description: Calculates actual cooldown after Ability Haste.

tools.name: lol_calc_attack_speed
tools.description: Calculates total attack speed (capped at 2.5).

bonus_attack_speed_percent.description: Total bonus attack speed percentage (e.g., 50 for 50%)

tools.name: lol_calc_crit_expected_damage
tools.description: Calculates expected damage with crit chance.

tools.name: lol_calc_damage_after_resistance
tools.description: Calculates final damage after armor/MR reduction.

resistance.description: Armor or Magic Resist value (can be negative)

tools.name: lol_calc_effective_armor
tools.description: Calculates armor after penetration applied.

tools.name: lol_calc_effective_health
tools.description: Calculates effective HP vs physical/magic damage.

resistance.description: Armor (vs physical) or Magic Resist (vs magic)

tools.name: lol_calc_lethality_to_armor_pen
tools.description: Calculates flat armor pen from Lethality at level.

tools.name: lol_calc_resistance_multiplier
tools.description: Calculates damage multiplier from armor/MR.

resistance.description: Armor or Magic Resist value (can be negative)

tools.name: lol_calc_skill_damage
tools.description: Calculates skill damage with AD/AP scaling.

tools.name: lol_esports_list_schedules
tools.description: Returns upcoming LoL esports schedules with teams, leagues, and match times in ISO 8601 UTC format. Always convert to user's timezone before presenting.

tools.name: lol_esports_list_team_standings
tools.description: Returns the latest team standings for the requested LoL league.

tools.name: tft_get_champion_item_build
tools.description: TFT tool for retrieving champion item build information.

champion_id.description: TFT champion ID (e.g., TFT9_Ahri) to retrieve item builds for.

tools.name: tft_get_play_style
tools.description: This tool provides comments on the playstyle of TFT champions.

tools.name: tft_list_augments
tools.description: Retrieves metadata for all Teamfight Tactics augments with localized names and descriptions in a table-friendly JSON (headers/rows/header_description). Returns apiName, desc, name, tier, and imageUrl for all augments in the specified language.

tools.name: tft_list_champions_for_item
tools.description: TFT tool for retrieving champion recommendations for a specific item.

item_id.description: TFT item ID (e.g., TFT_Item_Bloodthirster) to get champion recommendations for.

tools.name: tft_list_item_combinations
tools.description: TFT tool for retrieving information about item combinations and recipes.

tools.name: tft_list_meta_decks
tools.description: TFT deck list tool for retrieving current meta decks.

tools.name: valorant_list_agent_compositions_for_map
tools.description: Retrieve agent composition data for a Valorant map.

map_id.description: Valorant map identifier (e.g., ascent, bind, lotus).

tools.name: valorant_list_agent_statistics
tools.description: Retrieve character statistics data for Valorant, optionally filtered by map.

map_id.description: Optional Valorant map identifier (e.g., ascent, bind).

tools.name: valorant_list_agents
tools.description: Valorant character meta data

tools.name: valorant_list_leaderboard
tools.description: Fetch Valorant leaderboard by region

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract
desired_output_fields.description:
Select ONLY from fields below. This is a CLOSED SET. Do NOT invent new field names.

Available fields:
- current_page
- data[].badges[].{description,iconUrl,key,level,title,value}
- data[].stat.{assists,bodyShots,deaths,defeats,draws,gameCount,headShots,kills,legShots,rounds,score,wins}
- data[].{competitiveTier,gameName,leaderboardRank,level,mostCharacters[],numberOfWins,playerCardId,playerTitleId,puuid,rankedRating,tagLine}
- from
- lastUpdatedAt
- last_page
- per_page
- to
- total

tools.name: valorant_list_maps
tools.description: Valorant map meta data

tools.name: valorant_list_player_matches
tools.description: Retrieve match history for a Valorant player using their game name and tag line.

game_name.description: Riot ID game name before the "#" (e.g., "Faker" from "Faker#KR1")

tag_line.description: Riot ID tag line following the "#" (e.g., "KR1" from "Faker#KR1")
